description.en: Transcribe audio to text using ElevenLabs speech-to-text.
description.de: Audio mit ElevenLabs Speech-to-Text in Text transkribieren.

vars.API_KEY: env:ELEVENLABS_API_KEY|Get your API key from ElevenLabs at https://elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys

inputs.name: Audio URL

description.en: URL of the audio file to transcribe.

inputs.bot: A publicly accessible URL to an audio file (mp3, wav, etc.) to transcribe.

description.en: ISO 639-1 language code (e.g., 'en', 'de', 'es'). Auto-detected if not specified.
